items.title: Inside China’s green transition
items.summary: Ningbo, in southern Zhejiang Province of China, was once a historic maritime hub shaped by Buddhist culture and trade. It has now emerged as a key hub for showcasing China’s green industrial push, where electric vehicles, advanced manufacturing, and tightly integrated supply chains are powering the country’s bid for global leadership in the technologies of the future. Ananth Krishnan reports from the port city

items.title: Pentagon chief sounds ‘alarm’ over China’s buildup, urges allies to boost defence spend

items.title: International Peacekeepers Day: India underscores unflinching commitment to UN peacekeeping
items.summary: The International Day of United Nations Peacekeepers is marked annually on May 29, and India is among the largest troop-contributing countries which has deployed nearly three lakh troops in more than 50 UN Peacekeeping Missions since 1948
